headline: Iran Entities Shift $3.8B via CoinEx: TRM Reports

article.title: Iran-linked entities moved $3.8B through CoinEx, TRM says
article.summary: TRM Labs traced $3.8 billion moved by 60 sanctioned Iranian entities through CoinEx and said that the exchange’s 8% share of illicit transactions was substantially higher than its counterparts.

headline: Indonesia Sets Rules for 200M Crypto Users

article.title: Indonesia sets certification rules for influencers recommending crypto
article.summary: Indonesia’s financial regulator will require influencers recommending crypto and other digital assets to hold relevant certifications as regulators worldwide tighten oversight of finfluencers.

headline: Iraq Threatens OPEC Exit Over Quota Dispute

article.title: Iraq Warns It Might Quit OPEC If It Doesn’t Get Quota Hike
article.summary: Iraq warned it may ultimately considering leaving OPEC unless the group accommodates it with a higher oil production quota, just a few months after the United Arab Emirates quit the group so that it could pump more.

headline: Jamieson Wellness Weighs Sale, Hires BMO, Canaccord

article.title: Jamieson Wellness Explores Selling Itself, Taps BMO and Canaccord to Advise
article.summary: Jamieson Wellness Inc., the Canadian vitamins and supplements maker, is working with Bank of Montreal and Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. to explore a sale.

headline: Aave Token May Surge 50x by 2030: SC

article.title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
article.summary: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

headline: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over $100M Tax Dispute

article.title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
article.summary: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.

headline: Kraken Boosts OTC Lending with $300M Facility

article.title: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple
article.summary: Maple’s lenders will provide a revolving line of funding to supply USDC liquidity for Kraken's over-the-counter borrowers.

headline: Thailand Issues $28M Crypto Mining Arrest Warrant

article.title: Thailand issues arrest warrant for Chinese businessman tied to $28 million illegal crypto mining probe: report
article.summary: Chinese businessman Wang Yicheng was accused of involvement in illegal crypto mining operations that used $28 million worth of electricity.

headline: Crude Spikes 10% as Gulf Output Rebounds

article.title: Oil price back at prewar levels as Gulf flows pick up
article.summary: Brent crude drops below the $72.48 a barrel it traded at in late February before Iran conflict erupted

article.title: They think it’s oil over
article.summary: Plus gilts on the comeback trail
